title: Rome program index — primary pointer + flat inventory
description: Denormalized index over registry/programs/<id>/program.json files. Source of truth still lives in each program.json; this file enables (a) fast lookup of the primary program per Rome environment (devnet/testnet/mainnet), (b) flat inventory of all known programs without filesystem traversal. CI invariant: each entry's role/cluster/network/chainsHosted must match its program.json.

primary.description: ProgramId designated as the **Rome environment's** primary (the default program for new chains in that env). Keyed by Rome network, not Solana cluster — Rome devnet AND Rome testnet both run on Solana devnet but have distinct programs (RomeD vs RomeT). null when no primary has been promoted yet for that env. CI invariant: at most one primary per network, and primary[network] must match the corresponding program.json#role=='primary' AND program.json#network==<key>.

cluster.description: Solana cluster the program is deployed on.

network.description: Rome environment the program serves. Added v0.4.18.

programs.description: Flat map of programId → minimal denormalized fields. Keys are base58 program IDs.
